studyName: Tumor Heterogeneity in Metastatic Adrenocortical Tumors

tables.description: Sample ID, analyte type, body site, genotyping center, histological type, tumor status of sample, primary or metastatic tumor, primary tumor location, sequencing center, tumor grade, tumor stage, and tumor treatment of participants with or without metastatic adrenocortical carcinoma and involved in the "Metastatic Adrenocortical Carcinoma Displays Higher Mutation Rate and Tumor Heterogeneity than Primary Tumors" project.

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: GENOTYPING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted genotyping

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: PRIMARY_METASTATIC_TUMOR
variables.description: Primary tumor, metastasis, or transformed cell line

variables.name: SEQUENCING_CENTER
variables.description: Name of the center which conducted sequencing

variables.name: TUMOR_TREATMENT
variables.description: Type of tumor treatment for sample

tables.description: Subject ID, subject source, source subject ID, consent group, and affection status of participants with or without metastatic adrenocortical carcinoma and involved in the "Metastatic Adrenocortical Carcinoma Displays Higher Mutation Rate and Tumor Heterogeneity than Primary Tumors" project.

variables.name: AFFECTION_STATUS
variables.description: Case control status of the subject

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SOURCE_SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID used in the Source Repository

tables.description: Subject ID, sample ID, sample source, source sample ID, and sample use variable of participants with or without metastatic adrenocortical carcinoma and involved in the "Metastatic Adrenocortical Carcinoma Displays Higher Mutation Rate and Tumor Heterogeneity than Primary Tumors" project.

variables.name: SOURCE_SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID used in the Source Repository
